_doc: Single source of truth for the visual regression gate. Read identically by render_python.py (oracle) and harness.ts (TS port). Each scenario builds a GameState DIRECTLY on both sides (no menu flow) so a frame diff is attributable to RENDERING, not state divergence. W/H fixed at 1024x768. cfg.MAX_WIND=0 pins wind (and kills wind RNG draws). SKY is pinned per scenario. Two HUMAN players (ai_class=0) with tank_icon 0 and 1. BOTH sides set gs.mtn_ranges=[] to force the procedural _midpoint terrain (the .MTN _from_mtn decoder is a separate per-port codepath whose cross-port byte-equivalence is NOT what this gate measures; rendering parity is). exact=true scenarios use deterministic skies (PLAIN/SUNSET/STORMY/CAVERN: no render-time RNG) and are byte-compared on the WORLD region. exact=false (STARS) scatters stars via np.random (Python) vs Math.random (TS) at RENDER time -> EXPECTED to differ, reported but excluded from the world verdict.
